channel.title: CostSage Blog
channel.description: FinOps + AI cloud-cost optimization, written for AWS-first SaaS engineering teams.

item.title: 10 AWS Cost Optimisation Best Practices Every SaaS Company Should Follow in 2026
item.description: A 2026 playbook for AWS cost optimisation across rightsizing, Savings Plans, idle resources, storage, and tagging — written for SaaS teams already past visibility.

item.title: Reserved Instances vs Savings Plans: 2026 Update
item.description: Updated decision framework: when do RIs still beat Savings Plans, when does the reverse hold, and how to model the right mix.
